nodes.name: Watch Groupon Emails
nodes.notes: Configure IMAP credentials for the inbox that receives Groupon booking emails. Sender: notify@r.grouponmail.com.au. Subject patterns: 'Groupon Booking Tool - Groupon Customer Booking Confirmation', 'Groupon Booking Tool - Groupon Customer Cancellation Notification', 'Groupon Booking Tool - Groupon Booking Modification Notification'

nodes.name: Route by Type
nodes.notes: Checks the subject line to determine whether this is a new booking, cancellation, or modification email. Adds email_type field for downstream branching.

nodes.name: New Booking?
nodes.notes: Routes new bookings (true/output 0) to the full parsing + insert path. Cancellations and modifications (false/output 1) go to the cancel/modify path.

nodes.name: Parse Groupon Booking
nodes.notes: Parses the Groupon booking confirmation HTML email body using regex. Extracts: service description, booking date/time (YYYY-MM-DD, HH:MM), customer name/phone/email, Groupon code (booking reference), participant count, price from service text, and event name (service description with price prefix and ticket suffix stripped).

nodes.name: Match Event & Session
nodes.notes: Calls the match_event_session RPC to find the matching event_id and session_id by event name and date. Uses the same RPC function as the SFF, Promotix, FEVER, and GYG workflows.

nodes.name: Upsert Customer to CRM
nodes.notes: Upserts the customer into the customers CRM table using their real email address. Uses Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates to match on the email unique constraint. Source set to 'groupon'. Also stores phone number.

nodes.name: Prepare Ticket Entry
nodes.notes: Builds the manual_ticket_entries insert payload. partner_id: 37c101f1-31c1-41fd-9375-20813b89b194 (Groupon), commission_rate: 32%, status: 'confirmed'. Does NOT include commission_amount or net_revenue as those are generated columns in the database.

nodes.name: Insert Ticket Entry
nodes.notes: Inserts the ticket entry. The unique index on booking_reference (Groupon code) will reject duplicates (409 Conflict), which is expected and handled by the summary node.

nodes.name: Parse Cancellation/Modification
nodes.notes: Extracts the Customer Groupon Code from cancellation or modification emails. Sets target_status to 'cancelled' or 'modified' based on email_type. The Groupon code is used to find and update the matching ticket entry.

nodes.name: Cancel/Modify Ticket Entry
nodes.notes: Updates the existing ticket entry matching the Groupon code. Sets status to 'cancelled' or 'modified' and records the cancelled_at timestamp. Uses PATCH with query filter on booking_reference.

nodes.name: Errors - Review Needed
nodes.notes: Add a Slack or email notification here to alert when Groupon imports have errors.
